description: Baseline perovskite. Wide band gap, not suitable for solar.
Lead-free halide perovskite. Band gap still too high for solar.
Selenide perovskite. Near-perfect solar band gap 1.46 eV. Novel composition.
Spinel oxide. Near-ideal solar band gap 1.42 eV. All checks pass.
Cobalt tin spinel. Solar band gap but slightly low at 1.32 eV.
NEAR-PERFECT. Copper tin perovskite. 3 applications, ideal solar band gap.
Same score as CuSnO3. Ge variant, lighter density.
Quaternary 4-element oxide. 3 apps, slightly higher band gap.
Classic thermoelectric but model scores metallic (en_diff too small).
Tungsten bronze perovskite. Third 0.999 scorer. Novel composition.
